finding_results.notes: The voicemail is now explicitly recalled as a beat from hours earlier, before the hot tub, and the quarter-to-two beat now belongs to Nate going upstairs for the loser-bet handshake.

Nate now opens a lit room and finds Martin already on his left side facing the window, with the right hand hanging off the mattress. Nate touches only Martin's shoulder and leaves the door open when he goes for Paul.
The Friday-night prop is now a four-pill sample pack that Martin physically takes upstairs, preserving the crude joke while making the later remaining-pill chain legible.
Both refrigerator motif lines remain intact and now read as isolated sensory beats rather than part of a running count.
All other fridge/refrigerator mentions were removed or reframed. The chapter now contains only the two preserved atmospheric refrigerator references.
Explicit scotch/Lagavulin language was reduced to two mentions: one early brand-establishing reference and one nightstand bottle reference at discovery.
